Class AlertManager

java.lang.Object
Controllers.AlertManager
public class AlertManager extends Object
Manages budget alert notifications for the user.

Monitors both total cycle spending and daily spending against their respective limits, triggering alerts when thresholds (80% and 100%) are reached. Alerts are suppressed if one was already sent within the last hour to avoid spam. Notifications are dispatched via an AlertManager.AlertCallback if registered, or printed to the console as a fallback.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearNotifications()
    Clears the last alert timestamp, allowing new alerts to be sent immediately.
    void
    monitorBudgetTotalSpent(double totalSpent, double totalAllowance)
    Monitors total cycle spending and triggers an alert if 80% or 100% of the total allowance has been spent.
    void

    Monitors today's spending against the daily limit and triggers an alert if 80% or 100% of the daily limit has been reached.
    boolean

    Grants notification permissions for this manager.

    Dispatches the alert to the registered callback, or logs it to the console if no callback is set.

    Registers the callback that will receive alert events.
    private boolean
    shouldSuppressAlert()
    Determines whether an alert should be suppressed based on the one-hour cooldown window.
    void

    Triggers a generic budget percentage alert if suppression conditions are not met.
    void
    triggerAlert(String title, String message)
    Triggers an alert with a custom title and message if suppression conditions are not met.

    • lastAlertSent

      private Date lastAlertSent

  • Constructor Details

    • AlertManager

      public AlertManager()
      Constructs a new AlertManager with permissions granted by default.

  • Method Details

    • setCallback

      public void setCallback(AlertManager.AlertCallback callback)
      Registers the callback that will receive alert events.
      Parameters:
      callback - the AlertManager.AlertCallback to notify when an alert is triggered

    • requestPermissions

      public boolean requestPermissions()
      Grants notification permissions for this manager.
      Returns:
      true always, indicating permissions were granted

    • monitorBudgetTotalSpent

      public void monitorBudgetTotalSpent(double totalSpent, double totalAllowance)
      Monitors total cycle spending and triggers an alert if 80% or 100% of the total allowance has been spent.
      Parameters:
      totalSpent - the total amount spent in the current cycle
      totalAllowance - the total budget allowance for the cycle

    • monitorDailyLimit

      public void monitorDailyLimit(double todaySpent, double dailyLimit)
      Monitors today's spending against the daily limit and triggers an alert if 80% or 100% of the daily limit has been reached.
      Parameters:
      todaySpent - the total amount spent today
      dailyLimit - the recommended daily spending limit

    • triggerAlert

      public void triggerAlert(String title, String message)
      Triggers an alert with a custom title and message if suppression conditions are not met. Records the alert time to enforce the one-hour suppression window.
      Parameters:
      title - the alert title
      message - the alert message body

    • triggerAlert

      public void triggerAlert(double percentageReached)
      Triggers a generic budget percentage alert if suppression conditions are not met. Records the alert time to enforce the one-hour suppression window.
      Parameters:
      percentageReached - the percentage of the budget that has been reached

    • clearNotifications

      public void clearNotifications()
      Clears the last alert timestamp, allowing new alerts to be sent immediately.

    • shouldSuppressAlert

      private boolean shouldSuppressAlert()
      Determines whether an alert should be suppressed based on the one-hour cooldown window.
      Returns:
      true if an alert was sent within the last hour; false otherwise

    • sendNotification

      private void sendNotification(String title, String message)
      Dispatches the alert to the registered callback, or logs it to the console if no callback is set.
      Parameters:
      title - the alert title
      message - the alert message body
